pr.title: Record: 11L XSA-all + Full GPTQ + Selective Pruning (val_bpb=1.1154, 3-seed)

output.summary: Builds on the Parallel Muon/GPTQ stack by applying XSA to every layer and selectively pruning ±1 quant values by reconstruction error before artifact packing.
techniques: XSA across all 11 layers to mix positions from layer 0 onward
Selective post-GPTQ ±1 magnitude pruning guided by reconstruction-error scale²
Full Hessian GPTQ int6 + Parallel Muon/Parameter Banking stack
